name: @verifiable-agent-execution/docs
description: AGENTSCAN end-user documentation site (docs.agentscan.online). Nextra v4 docs theme, MDX content. Separate workspace package so it deploys independently of the dashboard.

scripts.test: echo 'no tests for docs site (content-only)' && exit 0

comment: Pinned to 4.2.17 to avoid the zod-4 + Layout-destructure bug in 4.3.0+: nextra-theme-docs Layout strips children from its props then validates against a schema that REQUIRES children, so every render throws 'expected nonoptional, received undefined → at children'. Found by inspecting the dist's LayoutPropsSchema.safeParse(themeConfig) call. 4.2.17 uses zod 3 + a different parse path that doesn't trip.
